Edward Hastings, 2nd Baron Hastings

Edward Hastings, 2nd Baron Hastings, KB (26 November 1466 – 8 November 1506) was an English peer born in Kirby Muxloe Castle …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Edward Hastings於1466年11月26日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯時，他的父親Baron William Hastings36歲，母親Catherine Neville24歲。他於1487年2月18日與Mary Hungerford在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年11月8日在英國倫敦享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Edward Hastings was born on 26 November 1466, in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, his father, Baron William Hastings, was 36 and his mother, Catherine Neville, was 24. He married Mary Hungerford on 18 February 1487, in Holy Trinity Church, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 November 1506, in London, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Blackfriars, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Edward Hastings est né le 26 novembre 1466, à Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Baron William Hastings, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Catherine Neville, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mary Hungerford le 18 février 1487, à Holy Trinity Church, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1506, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Edward Hastings am 26. November 1466 in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron William Hastings 36 und seine Mutter Catherine Neville 24. Er hat am 18. Februar 1487 in Holy Trinity Church, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Mary Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1506 im Alter von 39 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Blackfriars, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Edward Hastings è nato il il 26 novembre 1466 nel Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Baron William Hastings, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Neville, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mary Hungerford il 18 febbraio 1487, nel Holy Trinity Church, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1506, nel London, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Blackfriars, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Edward Hastingsが1466年11月26日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビー ベラーズで生まれた時，父Baron William Hastingsは36歳，母Catherine Nevilleは24歳であった。1487年2月18日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチホーリー トリニトイ チャーチでMary Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年11月8日にイギリスロンドンで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Edward Hastings(이)가 1466년 11월 26일 영국 레이스스터실르 커비 벨라러스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron William Hastings(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Neville(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1487년 2월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치 홀이 트리니티 처르치에서 Mary Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 11월 8일 영국 런던에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블랙프리아르스에 묻혔다.

pt.26 November 1466–8 November 1506: 26 de novembro de 1466–8 de novembro de 1506
pt.Ashby de la Zouch Castle, Leicestershire: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Holy Trinity, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicest: Holy Trinity Church, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.Beheaded in the Tower of London, Middles: Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Edward Hastings nasceu em 26 de novembro de 1466, em Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron William Hastings, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Neville, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Hungerford em 18 de fevereiro de 1487, em Holy Trinity Church, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1506, em London, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch Castle, Leicestershire: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Holy Trinity, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicest: холи тринити чурч, ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.Beheaded in the Tower of London, Middles: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Edward Hastings родился 26 ноября 1466 г. в местности кирби белларс, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron William Hastings было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Neville, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hungerford 18 февраля 1487 г. в местности холи тринити чурч, ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 ноября 1506 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron Edward Hastings nació el 26 de noviembre de 1466, en Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron William Hastings, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Catherine Neville, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mary Hungerford el 18 de febrero de 1487, en Holy Trinity Church, Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1506, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
